content_fingerprint: openai opens gpt 5 5 to verified cybersecurity defenders via trusted access program openai has added gpt 5 5 and a domain specific gpt 5 5 cyber variant to its trusted access for cyber program expanding access to vetted defenders working on vulnerability research and critical infrastructure protection openai has expanded its trusted access for cyber initiative to include two new model offerings gpt 5 5 and a specialized gpt 5 5 cyber variant both available to verified cybersecurity defenders through the company s existing trusted access framework the announcement was published to the openai ne
